name: Labvanced
tagline: Online experiment platform with built-in eye tracking
short_impression: Labvanced is an online experiment platform that integrates webcam-based eye tracking directly into its experiment builder. Designed for psychology and behavioral research, it combines no-code experiment design with advanced features including eye tracking and participant management. The platform's eye tracking has been peer-reviewed and validated for research use, achieving accuracy comparable to dedicated webcam solutions.
